ab: Away, Gaga su sapah hug?
en: Away, are you home?

ab: Iq! Aguh mtmay nhari.
en: Yes, come on in.

ab: Away, Gaga su sapah hug?
en: Away, are you home?

ab: Ungac sapah ka Away! Ipay ku ka yaku, hmuya hug? Rngagun mu miyah ka Away da.
ch: A:Away不在家耶!我是Ipay，有什麼事嗎? 回來我會轉告Aawy。
en: Away is not at home. I am Ipay. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.

ab: Ima namu ka yamu?
en: Who are you?

ab: Bubu rudan, Teymu ni Pihu nami wa! Jiyagi nami rmawah enduk!
ch: B:奶奶，我們是Teymu 和 Pihu，幫我們開門!
en: Grandma, we are Teymu and Pihu, please open the door for us.

ab: Ima hug?
en: Who is it?

ab: Yaku o Watan, miyah ku miying Ukan.
en: I am Watan, I am here for Ukan.

ab: Bubu rudan, nii ku miyah qmita sunan da.
en: Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: Bsiyaq su ini iyah da, lnglungun misu balay.
ch: A:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.

ab: Away, nii ku miyah miying sunan hmrapas da.
en: Away, I am here to play with you.

ab: Aguh mtmay nhari, bsiyaq ku tmaga sunan da.
en: Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: Hnuma mu ka bunga nii, uqi binaw!
ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看!
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!

ab: Shiya bi uqan ka bunga nii.
en: The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: Aguh! Hnuma mu ka hiyi qhuni nii, uqi binaw!
ch: A:過來!這是我種的水果，吃看看。
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.

ab: Ssibus bi ka hiyi qhuni nii.
en: The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: Tluung! Hnuma mu ka sqmu nii, uqi binaw!
ch: A:請坐!這是我種的有機玉米吃看看!
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.

ab: Waw! Ssibus uqun ka sqmu nii.
en: Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.

ab: Mkan su mudu hug?
en: Do you want some oranges?

ab: Naqih mu ka mkan mudu, mkan ku pingkwo do kiya da.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.

ab: Mkan su emu hug?
en: Would you want some cookies?

ab: Iq! Kuxul mu bi mkan.
en: Sure, I like it very much.

ab: Qmilis ku hiyi qhuni uqun su.
en: Let me peel the fruit for you.

ab: Mhuway su! Egu bi biyuq niya ka hiyi qhuni nii.
en: Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.

ab: Mimah su qsiya hug?
en: I will bring you some water.

ab: Bqanun misu qsiya mahun su.
en: Thank you.

ab: Mhuway su.
en: Thank you.

ab: Uqi egu hari, egu ka hnanguc mu damac.
en: Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ab: Waw! Malu sknxan ni malu uqun uri.
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.

ab: Uqi egu hari, niqan egu na hini.
en: Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.

ab: Uxay ku qsiqa mkan dwah!
en: I’ll make myself at home then.

ab: Uqi egu hari, niqan egu na hini.
en: Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.

ab: Egu da nkan mu, uxay ku mkan da.
ch: B:我吃了好多，不能再吃了。
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
